title: rubus × macarus
intro: Rubus × macarus, also known as the black raspberry hybrid, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including high levels of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × macarus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus × macarus include teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
